title: Artes Face
excerpt: This ai art is signed by Art Supreme. It is made on canvas and it comes with the original Certificate of Authenticity.
content: By replaying the work for each exhibition and pushing the evocative power of the work a little further, Artes Face focuses on the idea of ‘public space’ and more specifically on spaces where anyone can do anything at any given moment: the non-private space, the non-privately owned space, space that is economically interesting.
